channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dodgers Respond to Cubs' Manager's Criticism of Shohei Ohtani's Rule
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have responded to criticism from Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell regarding the 'Ohtani Rule,' a set of regulations aimed at allowing two-way players like Shohei Ohtani to s...

item.title: Trump Confirms Remote Talks with Iran, Appreciates Pakistan’s Mediation Role
item.description: US President Donald Trump confirmed that any further talks with Iran will be conducted remotely, appreciating Pakistan for its mediatory role between Washington and Tehran. Trump emphasized that Islam...

item.title: Meghan Markle hints at end of challenging seven years in recent Instagram posts
item.description: Meghan Markle has suggested that the 'hardest seven years' of her life may be coming to an end. In a series of recent Instagram posts, the Duchess shared a horoscope video that resonated with her Leo ...

item.title: Woman bailed following investigation into fatal Wolverhampton house fire that killed two young children
item.description: A woman in her 30s has been released on police bail after being arrested on suspicion of causing or allowing the deaths of two young children following a fatal house fire in Wolverhampton. The inciden...

item.title: FCT Teachers Resume Work After Government Approves ₦5 Billion Monthly Support
item.description: Teachers for Federal Capital Territory (FCT) don suspend their strike after government intervention led by FCT Minister, Nyesom Wike. The Nigeria Union of Teachers (NUT), through their State Wing Exec...

item.title: Atletico Madrid defeats Athletic Bilbao, boosts morale ahead of Arsenal clash
item.description: Atletico Madrid secured a 3-2 victory over Athletic Bilbao on April 25, 2026, in La Liga, as they geared up for their crucial Champions League semi-final clash with Arsenal. Alexander Sorloth was the ...

item.title: AFP Chief Urges New WESCOM Commander to Uphold Steady Presence in West Philippine Sea
item.description: On April 26, 2026, Vice Admiral Alan Javier formally assumed command of the Armed Forces of the Philippines' Western Command (WESCOM) during a ceremony at Antonio Bautista Air Base in Puerto Princesa ...

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Ends Relationship with Klay Thompson, Cites Trust and Fidelity Issues
item.description: Grammy-winning rapper Megan Thee Stallion don publicly confirm say her relationship with NBA star Klay Thompson don end, and the matter no be small one. According to wetin she share, the breakup happe...

item.title: IMF Board Meeting on May 8 to Approve $1.2bn Funding for Pakistan
item.description: Islamabad – The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has scheduled a meeting of its executive board on May 8 to authorise the disbursement of more than $1.2 billion to Pakistan. This funding comes under ...

item.title: Inter's Serie A Title Hopes Dented After Draw With Torino; Milan and Juve Share Points
item.description: Inter Milan’s push for the Serie A title hit a roadblock on Sunday when they let a two-goal lead slip away, ending their match with Torino in a 2-2 draw. Inter had been cruising after goals from Marcu...

item.title: OMODA & JAECOO Launch International Hybrid Vehicle Test Drive Across China
item.description: OMODA & JAECOO, a brand under China’s Chery Group, is launching a large-scale international test drive event called the “9 Countries Super Hybrid Marathon,” bringing together media representatives fro...

item.title: Trump Appreciates PM Shehbaz and CDF Munir for Mediation in US-Iran Talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday expressed his appreciation for Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces Field Marshal Asim Munir for their dedicated mediation efforts in talks bet...

item.title: Mother and Son Tragically Lose Their Lives After Water Incident in London Park
item.description: A tragic incident has unfolded in a London park, where a mother and her son have lost their lives after getting into difficulty in the water. Emergency services responded swiftly, but despite their ef...

item.title: Human Origins Likely Shaped by Multiple Interconnected Populations in Africa
item.description: Recent genetic research from the University of California, Davis challenges the long-standing view that all modern humans descended from a single ancestral population in Africa. By analyzing genomes f...

item.title: Informant Contacts Connecticut Authorities Following Shooting Near White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: A person who had information about a shooting incident near the White House Correspondents’ Dinner contacted local police in Connecticut, opening a new lead in the investigation. The shooting occurred...

item.title: Man Arrested Following Major Fire at LGBT Nightclub
item.description: A man has been arrested after a significant fire broke out at the Pink Punters nightclub, a popular LGBT venue. The incident, which occurred in the early hours of the morning, caused extensive damage ...

item.title: Jodi Sta. Maria Shares Fun Moments on 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal'
item.description: Jodi Sta. Maria recently appeared on the popular Filipino game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal,' hosted by Luis Manzano. The episode highlighted her cheerful and engaging personality, as she interacte...

item.title: Multiple Shootings Reported Across Mali as Security Situation Remains Unstable
item.description: Heavy gunfire shake several parts of Mali on Saturday, including Kati, wey be the stronghold of military ruler General Assimi Goita. Witnesses and security sources confirm say fighting also happen for...

item.title: Man arrested after fire at LGBT+ nightclub in Milton Keynes
item.description: A man has been arrested on suspicion of arson with intent to endanger life following a blaze at the Pink Punters nightclub in Fenny Stratford, Milton Keynes. The fire broke out in the early hours of S...

item.title: Wike’s aide accuses Makinde of VP ambition and inciting political tension
item.description: Lere Olayinka, wey be Senior Special Assistant on Public Communications and Social Media to FCT Minister Nyesom Wike, don openly criticise Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde, accusing am of chasing vice-...
